entries.title: Unified Agent Runtime — 3-Week Build Plan Complete
entries.summary: Completed the 3-week build plan: unified agent runtime with canonical event types, skill model, Merkle chain, Zod schemas. Four public repos on GitHub. TEE bootstraps with TPM signing, skills load through policy engine, settlements write to Sovereign Secret.
keyFacts: 4 packages: agent-runtime v0.2.0, agent-wallet v0.2.0, morpheus-agent v0.3.0, agent-tee v0.1.0
22 source files, ~10,000 lines TypeScript, all compiling clean
AgentEvent type system with 25 event categories
SkillManifest with Zod validation — skills are signed, verified code modules
TEECore.loadSkill() routes signing through policy engine → Desktop TPM
Real TPM signature verified through TEE relay

entries.title: Multi-AI Peer Review: Pressure Test + Thesis Draft
entries.summary: ChatGPT conducted an engineering pressure test of the unified runtime. Identified fragility points (settlement atomicity, skill policy bypass, checkpoint fork race). Proposed whitepaper thesis: 'Measured and Observed Execution' — combining TEE measurement with blockchain observation for verifiable AI.
keyFacts: Agent defined: sovereign wallet with policy, chain, and skills
Sequential execution is a correctness requirement, not a limitation
Healthcare + audit firms identified as Tier 1 customers (regulatory requirement)
Whitepaper thesis: 'We do not need to trust AI outputs. We need to verify how they were produced.'
Three fragility points identified and documented with mitigations

entries.title: First AI Agent with Birth Certificate Goes Live on Polygon
entries.summary: Created the world's first AI agent with a verifiable birth certificate on a public blockchain. The agent runs on Morpheus decentralized inference (Kimi K2.5), with every inference call recorded as a signed, hash-linked Note settled on Polygon mainnet.
keyFacts: Birth certificate names two parents: AI (Morpheus/Kimi K2.5) and Authorizer (Steven Sprague)
3 inference calls, 4,213 tokens, hash-linked chain with settlement Merkle root
Sovereign Secret on Polygon: 0x70b893e3b519255166a1fb64dcde920d056a2d5c
Full session archive encrypted on IPFS, viewable via share link
Total on-chain cost: $0.03

entries.title: v0.2.0: Full Session Archiving + Secure Channel
entries.summary: Released v0.2.0 with full session content archiving (prompts + responses to IPFS), SecureChannel integration (Layer 1 agent-side signing), and settle-to-Notes optimization reducing cost from $0.41 to $0.01 per session.
keyFacts: Full AI output now archived to IPFS encrypted, recoverable from wallet address
SecureChannel wired into every inference call — prompt hashes signed, responses hashed
Session archives append as Notes to Sovereign Secret (40x cheaper than new Secrets)
7,082 tokens across 3 inference calls in Session 2
Kimi K2.5 independently described exact Rootz architecture without knowing it exists

entries.title: proof.rootz.global Launched
entries.summary: Launched proof.rootz.global — the public-facing site documenting AI with Proof of Origin. Includes live share links to on-chain birth certificate, session archive, and test report. AI Discovery Standard deployed.
keyFacts: Three shareable on-chain secrets: birth certificate, session archive, test report
AI Discovery Standard (/.well-known/ai) with full three-tier architecture
GitHub repos: rootz-global/morpheus-agent and rootz-global/proof-site
All content encrypted on IPFS, decryptable via share links in browser

entries.title: Four Layers of Provable AI Defined
entries.summary: Defined the four-layer trust model for provable AI: Layer 1 (agent signs), Layer 2 (provider signs), Layer 3 (ECDH + TEE), Layer 4 (model provenance from signed sources). Layer 1 working, Layer 2 patch ready.
keyFacts: Layer 1: Working — agent signs prompt hashes, hashes responses, settles Merkle root
Layer 2: Patch ready — Go middleware for Morpheus proxy-router response signing
Layer 3: Designed — ECDH channel + TEE attestation
Layer 4: Spec phase — model built from signed training data, weight hashes, build attestation
Layer 4 applies TCG Reference Integrity Manifest (RIM) to AI model supply chain
